scenarios.title: AI Pipelines, Workflows, RAG, and Agents
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks about end-to-end document QA apps, RAG workflow orchestration, component pipelines, retrieval, reranking, reasoning, citations, and Gradio-backed RAG experiences.
scenarios.role: Kotaemon covers a document-QA RAG app plus a composable Python RAG library for building, configuring, and debugging retrieval workflows.
scenarios.read_when: The task mentions Kotaemon, ktem, document QA, file index chat, `BaseComponent`, `Document`, `RetrievedDocument`, vector retrieval, citation QA, RAG pipelines, prompt UI, reasoning modes, GraphRAG in Kotaemon, or a Gradio RAG app with LLM and embedding resources.
scenarios.best_for: Installing or operating the Kotaemon web app, composing Kotaemon RAG pipelines, configuring file indexes and retrieval, debugging citations and low-confidence answers, and adding custom reasoning/index extensions.
scenarios.avoid_when: Avoid for generic vector database clients, standalone LlamaIndex/LangChain tasks not using Kotaemon, or unrelated model serving frameworks; choose a narrower retrieval, provider, or serving skill instead.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose kotaemon when the request combines a document QA/RAG app, file indexing, LLM/embedding resources, citations, or Kotaemon/ktem APIs rather than only a generic provider SDK or vector store.

scenarios.title: Document Processing, Unstructured Data, and RAG Preparation
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks about preparing local files, PDFs, scanned documents, tables, OCR outputs, metadata, and chunks for RAG indexing.
scenarios.role: Kotaemon provides guidance for its loader/parser/splitter stack and document metadata expected by file indexing workflows.
scenarios.read_when: The task mentions Kotaemon document ingestion, PDF/table/OCR loaders, Docling, PaddleOCR, Mathpix, Azure Document Intelligence, DOCX/HTML/XLSX/TXT readers, `Document` metadata, `table_origin`, `page_label`, or chunking before indexing.
scenarios.best_for: Choosing a Kotaemon reader, validating document-like JSON records, diagnosing optional parser dependencies, preserving table metadata, and preparing chunks for the Kotaemon file index.
scenarios.avoid_when: Avoid for document conversion tools outside Kotaemon or pure OCR/model tasks with no Kotaemon indexing or RAG-preparation context.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose kotaemon for document preparation when the target output is Kotaemon `Document` records, ktem File Index data, or a Kotaemon RAG pipeline.

scenarios.title: Python AI API Services and Deployment
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks about launching, configuring, packaging, or operating Python AI applications, Gradio apps, local model services, Docker images, and app data directories.
scenarios.role: Kotaemon covers deployment and configuration of the Kotaemon Gradio document-QA app and its model/resource settings.
scenarios.read_when: The task mentions `python app.py`, Kotaemon Docker images, Gradio server variables, `.env`, `flowsettings.py`, app data, PDF.js, local Ollama or llama-cpp server setup for the app, first setup/login, or Chroma migration preflight.
scenarios.best_for: Safe app configuration diagnostics, Docker/local setup guidance, PDF viewer setup, local provider URL checks, update/migration caution, and operator troubleshooting for Kotaemon deployments.
scenarios.avoid_when: Avoid for deploying unrelated FastAPI/Gradio apps or generic model servers unless they are being configured as Kotaemon providers.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose kotaemon when deployment questions name Kotaemon/ktem or include its app config signals such as `KH_*`, `GRADIO_*`, File Index, Resources tab, PDF.js, or local RAG provider setup.
